nasb.text: Then it came about in the morning that Balak took Balaam and brought him up to the high places of Baal, and he saw from there a portion of the people.

esv.text: And in the morning Balak took Balaam and brought him up to Bamoth-baal, and from there he saw a fraction of the people.

cnv.text: 到了早晨，巴勒帶著巴蘭上了巴力的高岡；巴蘭就從那裡觀看以色列民的邊界。

ccb.text: 次日清晨，巴勒领巴兰上到巴力巴末，从那里可以看到一部分以色列人。
